feats.name: Mark of Silver Talon
feats.description:
**Silver Talon Form.** Once per long rest, you can partially transform into your wolf form for 1 minute. While transformed, your walking speed increases by 5 feet, you can use your Claw Attack, and you have advantage on Charisma (Intimidation) checks.

**Moonmarked.** You have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

**Moonlight Resilience.** Once per long rest, when you would be reduced to 0 hit points while standing in direct moonlight, you can instead drop to 1 hit point.

feats.name: Mark of Silver Talon (Improved)
feats.description:
**Silver Talon Form.** Once per long rest, you can partially transform into your wolf form for 1 minute. While transformed, your walking speed increases by 5 feet, you can use your Claw Attack, and you have advantage on Charisma (Intimidation) checks.

**Moonmarked.** You have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

**Moonlight Resilience.** Once per long rest, when you would be reduced to 0 hit points while standing in direct moonlight, you can instead drop to 1 hit point.

**Pact Sense.** You gain Darkvision out to a range of 60 feet. If you already have Darkvision, its range increases by 60 feet.
